name: sqlserver
description: Dedicated Microsoft SQL Server expert plugin covering the full scope of database management — operations, monitoring, HA/clustering, availability groups, mirroring endpoints, engineering, infrastructure, cloud offerings, and security/authentication — across versions 2016-2025 and the Azure SQL / AWS RDS cloud families.
